info.name: User Service
info.description: Automated registration, login OTP flow for ABAY eQub API

item.name: Verify Phone OTP and Reset Password
Verify By Email OTP and Reset Password

formdata.value: You have received 500 ETB in your wallet.
You have received 500 ETB in your wallet.

request.description:
## Broadcast Push Notification

Sends a push notification to **all users** in the system. Notifications are dispatched in configurable batches with an optional delay between each batch, allowing controlled delivery at scale.

---

## Request Body

This endpoint accepts `multipart/form-data` with the following fields:

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `title` | `string` | The title of the push notification displayed to the user. |
| `body` | `string` | The message body/content of the push notification. |
| `batchSize` | `integer` | Number of notifications to send per batch. Controls throughput (e.g., `500`). |
| `delayMs` | `integer` | Delay in milliseconds between each batch. Use `0` for no delay. |

**Example values:**

```
title     = "New Payment Received"
body      = "You have received 500 ETB in your wallet."
batchSize = 500
delayMs   = 0

 ```

---

## Sample Successful Response

**Status:** `200 OK`

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Broadcast notification sent successfully",
  "data": {
    "totalSuccess": 2,
    "totalFailure": 0,
    "invalidTokensCount": 0
  },
  "image": "uploads/users/notifications/broadcast/..."
}

 ```

### Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `success` | `boolean` | Indicates whether the broadcast operation succeeded. |
| `message` | `string` | A human-readable status message. |
| `data.totalSuccess` | `integer` | Number of notifications successfully delivered. |
| `data.totalFailure` | `integer` | Number of notifications that failed to deliver. |
| `data.invalidTokensCount` | `integer` | Number of device tokens found to be invalid during the broadcast. |
| `image` | `string` | Path to the notification image used in the broadcast (if any). |

formdata.value: You have received 500 ETB in your wallet.

    "name": "Manager",

    "permissionId": 3,
    "admin": false,
    "user": true
}

request.description:
### 🔎 Search

```
GET /users?search=john

 ```

Searches:

- fullName
    
- email
    
- phone
    

---

### 🔍 Filtering

```
GET /admin/users?isActive=true
GET /admin/users?acceptedTerms=false

 ```

---

### 📄 Pagination

```
GET /users?page=2&limit=10

 ```

---

### 🔃 Sorting

```
GET /users?sortBy=fullName&order=asc

 ```

Protected by whitelist to prevent SQL injection.

request.description:
# 🔎 What You Can Now Do From Frontend

### Search

```
GET /members?search=john

 ```

Searches:

- fullName
    
- phone
    
- group name
    

---

### Filter by Group

```
GET /members?groupId=3

 ```

---

### Filter by Package

```
GET /members?packageId=2

 ```

---

### Filter by Status

```
GET /members?status=paid

 ```

---

### Sorting

```
GET /members?sortBy=payoutOrder&order=ASC

 ```

GET {{url}}/api/equb/transactions  

This endpoint returns **transactions for the logged-in user’s wallet**.

---

# 📘 Query Parameters – Get My Transactions

Use these in **Postman → Params tab**

| Key | Type | Required | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| page | number | ❌ | Page number (default: 1) | 1 |
| limit | number | ❌ | Items per page (default: 10) | 10 |
| type | string | ❌ | Filter by transaction type | deposit |
| status | string | ❌ | Filter by transaction status | completed |
| method | string | ❌ | Filter by payment method | wallet |
| minAmount | number | ❌ | Minimum transaction amount | 100 |
| maxAmount | number | ❌ | Maximum transaction amount | 1000 |
| startDate | string | ❌ | Start date (YYYY-MM-DD) | 2026-01-01 |
| endDate | string | ❌ | End date (YYYY-MM-DD) | 2026-02-01 |
| sortBy | string | ❌ | Field to sort by (default: createdAt) | amount |
| order | string | ❌ | Sort direction (ASC or DESC) | ASC |

---

## 🔹 Allowed Values

### `type`

```
deposit
withdrawal
contribution
payout
fee
refund

 ```

### `status`

```
pending
completed
failed
canceled

 ```

### `method`

```
wallet
bank
mobile_money

 ```

---

# ✅ Example Full Query (Postman)

In Params tab:

| KEY | VALUE |
| --- | --- |
| page | 1 |
| limit | 10 |
| type | deposit |
| status | completed |
| minAmount | 100 |
| sortBy | amount |
| order | ASC |

Equivalent URL:

```
{{url}}/api/equb/transactions?page=1&limit=10&type=deposit&status=completed&minAmount=100&sortBy=amount&order=ASC

 ```

---
